title: Plectocephalus bridgesii
taxonomy: Plectocephalus bridgesii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Plectocephalus. The species Plectocephalus bridgesii is native to South America. This plant is further classified into the order Asterales and the class Magnoliopsida. Its classification is also associated with the kingdom Plantae.
